allow: Bash(# Search for dlltool in all common locations find /usr -name ""dlltool*"" find /mingw64 -name ""dlltool*"" find /c/msys64 -name ""dlltool*"" # Check if dlltool package is installed in the MSYS2 ls /var/lib/pacman/local/)
Bash(# Check if VS 2022 build tools are accessible export PATH=""$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"" # Look for cl.exe and vcvars find ""C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022"" -name ""cl.exe"")
